content.text:
Objectifs de l’enseignement
Cloud computing is an emerging revolution that provides computing and storage services of remote servers through a network. In this course, you will analyze possible security issues in the cloud environment and identify appropriate levels of security. You will gain experience with tools and techniques that prevent and mitigate the security threats and learn how to architect and configure security-related features in a cloud platform.
Contenu de la matière
Introduction to cloud security
Security issues and requirements
Identity and access management (IAM)
Security tools and services
TPs
Introduction to OpenStack platform, management of resources, analysis of security flaws, and deployment of security policies.
Mode d’évaluation : Contrôle continu, examen Références
• •
Dotson, C. Practical cloud security: a guide for secure design and deployment. O'Reilly Media.
Mishra, P., Pilli, E. S., & Joshi, R. C. Cloud Security: Attacks, Techniques, Tools, and Challenges.
